title: symphyotrichum cordifolium var. racemiflorum
intro: Symphyotrichum cordifolium var. racemiflorum, also known as New England aster, is a perennial plant belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae). This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities, making it effective in treating various health conditions such as wounds, fever, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Symphyotrichum cordifolium var. racemiflorum include reducing inflammation, fighting infections, and exhibiting antioxidant properties, which can help protect against cell damage and promote overall well-being. Herbal preparations of this plant are often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health ailments.
